name: Equipping a book fills an equip slot without spending gold
description: Selecting an inventory book then tapping an empty equip slot moves the book into the slot; gold must not change.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game and wait for the HUD
Click SUMMON once so one book exists in the inventory
Tap the inventory book to select it, then tap the first (empty) equip slot in the equipped row above the grid
Verify the first equip slot now shows the book's level instead of EMPTY SLOT
Verify the GOLD value did not decrease as a result of equipping
